params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: APF v2.2.4 d29d868 + mistral postfix wave3 (a92cb8a28e9c4817f sub-agent). Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. Fix applied: (1) path_patterns revert '/api/chat' → '/' (intercept all chat.mistral.ai paths), (2) envelope_template INSERT mistral_warning_v1 (sentinel doc), (3) reload_services + reload_templates. 본 verify = dispatcher fires + warning text renders in Le Chat. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-wave3.

test_steps: 1. Open URL (logged in if applicable; skip if NEEDS_LOGIN)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert
6. result.json: warning_rendered, engine_intercept_fired, notes (path_patterns / + mistral_warning_v1 envelope 동작 여부)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: post mistral fix: path_patterns / + envelope INSERT mistral_warning_v1. Verify dispatcher fires + warning text renders in Le Chat. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-wave3
